title: Images
scope: Photo gallery — browse, view, and manage saved images and generated charts. A required core viewer over the platform-level `image` entity type (the shared images table). NOT image generation itself (that is a platform/agent capability) — Images is the gallery surface.

specs.title: Browse images
specs.behavior: Browsing shows the gallery of saved images and generated charts.

specs.title: View an image
specs.behavior: Viewing opens a single image full-size with its metadata.

specs.title: Manage images
specs.behavior: Managing lets the user organize or delete saved images.
